name: WD_CLOCK_ANALOG
description: Analog clock widget with rotating hands and circular hour digits. Shows hour/minute/second hands rotating around center. Current hour digit highlighted. Supports theme colors (blue/orange). Hour positions arranged in circle pattern. Hands rotate smoothly with proper angles.
visualForm: Circular analog clock face (320x240) with three rotating hands (hour/minute/second), hour digit at current position, theme-colored hour hand
descriptionKo: 회전하는 핸드와 원형으로 배열된 시각 숫자가 있는 아날로그 시계 위젯입니다. 시/분/초 핸드가 중심을 기준으로 회전하며 현재 시각 숫자를 강조합니다. 파란색/주황색 테마를 지원합니다.
descriptionEn: Analog clock widget with rotating hands and circular hour digits. Shows hour/minute/second hands rotating around center. Current hour digit highlighted. Supports theme colors (blue/orange). Hour positions arranged in circle pattern. Hands rotate smoothly with proper angles.
